allow: Bash(node -e "const d = new Date\(2026, 3, 0\); console.log\('getDate:', d.getDate\(\)\); console.log\('full:', d\);")

Bash(node -e "const y='2026', m='02'; const d = new Date\(parseInt\(y\), parseInt\(m\), 0\); console.log\('Feb 2026:', d.toISOString\(\), 'getDate:', d.getDate\(\)\); const d2 = new Date\(parseInt\(y\), parseInt\(m\)-1, 0\); console.log\('getDate for Feb:', d2.getDate\(\)\);")
